name: Fudge Brownie Pie (Rice)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Add the eggs; mix well.
3. Stir in the flour, cocoa, salt, vanilla, and nuts.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch pie pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until almost set.
6. Serve with whipped cream and strawberries if desired.
Yield: 6 servings.
